text:
In a small coastal town called Seabreeze, there lived an unusual girl named Alice. She had a pet dragon named Basil. Every evening after dark, Basil would come indoors with Alice, nestled in a basket on the sofa. They didn't talk; Basil just hummed soothing tunes while Alice dreamed. Her favorite thing to dream about were castles made of flowers.

One summer night, a fierce breeze blew in the window. Alice smiled. Basil crooned, and she drifted off to sleep with the most vivid picture: That castle—all flower petals—and it was hers.

Years passed, and Alice grew up. She pursued archery, becoming quite skilled. One winter, a great storm hit Seabreeze. There were no birds, no flowers. Alice was heartbroken.

Then, one day, she dreamed about the castle. It was hers again!

Excited, Alice went out to find it. She stumbled upon an ancient forest. Through the trees, she saw it—a castle perched
